title: Luna 6 Low Speed Collisions得分：交叉、转向、泊车与Dooring场景
content: Low Speed Collisions满分20，配置差异显著：1V为3.25，1V2R为3.75，1V3-5R为14，5V5R12Uss为17.5。Car-to-Car Crossing从0提升到3/3；Car-to-Motorcyclist Crossing从0提升到3/3；Car-to-Motorcyclist Turn Across Path从2.25提升到3/3；Car-to-Pedestrian Manoeuvring Moving从0提升到1.5再到5/5；Car-to-Bicyclist Crossing从0提升到2/3；Dooring从0到0.5/2。超声波与多传感器对低速近场场景贡献最大。
